name: portfolio-meta-word-services-dropped-by-extractor
description: Regression for the May 8 bug: user said 'Yes my projects' at SALES_CHAT after the bot asked what to highlight. The salesBot trigger tag carried services=['projects'] and stored it as websiteData.services, so the confirm summary later read 'Services: projects' — wrong, since 'projects' is a website-section reference, not an actual skill. Now both the salesBot trigger post-filter AND extractServices drop pure meta-words (projects/work/cases/portfolio/etc.). This fixture exercises the extractServices path: at WEB_COLLECT_SERVICES, the user reply 'projects' should NOT land as services=['Projects'] — the meta-word filter strips it.
